title: ChemProt - Chemical-Protein Interaction Annotation
description: Identify chemical and gene/protein entities and classify their interaction types in biomedical text, based on the ChemProt corpus from BioCreative VI (Krallinger et al., 2017). Supports relation extraction for drug-target interaction mining from literature.
citation:
@inproceedings{krallinger2017biocreative,
    title = "Overview of the BioCreative VI chemical-protein interaction Track",
    author = "Krallinger, Martin and Rabal, Obdulia and Akhondi, Saber A. and others",
    booktitle = "Proceedings of the BioCreative VI Workshop",
    year = "2017",
    url = "https://biocreative.bioinformatics.udel.edu/tasks/biocreative-vi/track-5/"
}
